recalls.Description: Mengna is recalling Criblike aftermarket play yard and non-full-sized crib mattresses due to serious safety concerns. These mattresses, available in two models, XCD-001 and XCD-002, are white and measure approximately 38 inches by 26 inches, while the Mini-crib model, MNCL-001, measures about 38 inches by 24 inches. The model number and brand name 'Criblike' are printed on labels located at the end of the mattresses.
recalls.Title: Criblike Mattresses Recalled Due to Entrapment and Suffocation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Mengna via email at Criblike-service_2025@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Criblike Pack and Play Mattress XCD-002
Recalled Criblike Pack and Play Mattress Label XCD-002
Recalled Criblike Mini-Crib Mattress Label MNCL-001
Recalled Criblike Pack and Play Mattress XCD-001
Recalled Criblike Pack and Play Mattress Label XCD-001

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from May 2023 through September 2025, priced between $20 and $60.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and suffocation risks due to improper fit in play yards or cribs, as well as flammability issues.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the mattresses immediately and contact Criblike for a full refund. Consumers should cut the mattresses in half, photograph the destroyed product, and email the image to Criblike-service_2025@outlook.com with 'Recall Proof' and their name in the subject line.

recalls.metaDescription: Important recall of Criblike mattresses due to suffocation hazards. Contact Mengna for a refund and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: South Shore Industries has issued a recall for Balka and Olena cribs due to safety concerns. These cribs, available in white and natural wood finishes, measure approximately 37 inches in height, 54 inches in length, and 30 inches in depth. The model number can be found on an adhesive label located on one end of the crib. The affected models include various configurations of the Balka and Olena cribs, all featuring adjustable heights.
recalls.Title: South Shore Cribs Recalled for Entrapment Risk and Safety Regulation Violation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to South Shore at 800-290-0465 from 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email service@southshorefurniture.com. More details can be found online at www.southshorefurniture.com/us-en/recall or by visiting www.southshorefurniture.com/us-en and selecting 'Recall information' at the top of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled South Shore Balka Baby Crib with Adjustable Height (13825) and (14408)
Recalled South Shore Balka Baby Crib with Adjustable Height (13824)
Recalled South Shore Balka Baby Crib with Adjustable Height (12937)
Recalled South Shore Balka Baby Crib with Adjustable Height (12938)

Importers.Name: South Shore Industries LTD, of Canada

Hazards.Name: Entrapment hazard due to wider slat spacing

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled cribs immediately and contact South Shore for disassembly instructions. For a full refund, take a photo of the disassembled crib in an outdoor waste container and email it to service@southshorefurniture.com. South Shore, Amazon.com, and Walmart.com will notify all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: South Shore recalls Balka and Olena cribs due to entrapment hazards. Contact South Shore for refunds and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: RH Baby & Child is recalling the Jeune French Contemporary Upholstered Panel Cribs due to a choking hazard. The affected cribs feature wooden frames with upholstered end and lower panels and come in brushed gray oak, brushed light oak, and brushed white oak finishes. They measure approximately 30 inches in width, 55½ inches in length, and 42 inches in height. The SKU numbers for these products start with 113210, 113313, or 113754, which can be found on the receipt and a label on the inner-lower part of the crib.
recalls.Title: RH Baby & Child Recalls Jeune French Contemporary Cribs Due to Choking Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled cribs immediately and reach out to RH at 833-611-1775, available from 6 a.m. to 7 p.m. PT on weekdays and 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT on weekends. They can also email recall@rh.com or visit https://rhbabyandchild.rh.com/us/en/customer-experience/safety-recalls for further assistance.

Products.Name: Jeune French Contemporary Upholstered Panel Cribs
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 480 (In addition, about 10 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled RH Baby & Child's Jeune French Contemporary Upholstered Panel Crib
The SKU numbers are printed on the receipt, and on a label located on the inner-lower portion of the upholstered panel

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of a metal insert loosening and detaching. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at RH Baby & Child stores, RH outlets across the country, and online at https://rhbabyandchild.rh.com from January 2021 through March 2024, priced between $600 and $2,900.

Importers.Name: RH US LLC, of Corte Madera, California

Hazards.Name: Loose cylindrical metal inserts in the crib's frame may detach, creating a choking hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the recalled cribs and contact RH for a full refund or a replacement crib with free shipping. If no receipt is available, a $1,260 cash refund, credit, or a replacement crib will be provided at no charge. RH will arrange for free pickup of the recalled crib and will contact all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: RH Baby & Child recalls Jeune French Contemporary Cribs due to a choking hazard. Immediate action is required for consumers.

recalls.Description: Crate & Barrel is recalling its Hampshire Cribs due to a potential fall hazard. These cribs were available in various colors including blush, olive, white, gray, and natural brown. Each crib features one of the following SKU numbers: 246898, 534758, 534987, 535020, or 405394, and the brand name 'Crate&Barrel' can be found on a label on the mattress support board.
recalls.Title: Crate & Barrel Recalls Hampshire Cribs Due to Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Crate & Barrel at 800-967-6696, available from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT Monday through Friday, and from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT on weekends. Additional information can be found at www.crateandbarrel.com/customer-service/product-recalls or www.crateandkids.com under the 'Recalls' section.

Products.Name: Crate & Barrel Hampshire Cribs
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 3,200 (In addition, about 120 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Crate & Barrel Hampshire Crib - Blush
Recalled Crate & Barrel Hampshire Crib - Gray
Recalled Crate & Barrel Hampshire Crib - White
Recalled Crate & Barrel Hampshire Crib - Olive
Recalled Crate & Barrel Hampshire Crib - Natural Brown
Recalled Crate & Barrel Hampshire Cribs – label on the mattress support board with SKU number

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 12 reports of incidents of the mattress support pins becoming loose. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Crateandbarrel.com from June 2022 to November 2023, priced between $600 and $800.

Importers.Name: Euromarket Designs Inc., d/b/a Crate & Barrel, of Northbrook, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Potential fall hazard due to separation of the hydraulic cylinder rod from the piston.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the cribs immediately and reach out to Crate & Barrel for a free repair or a full refund. The company is also contacting all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Crate & Barrel recalls Hampshire Cribs due to fall hazards. Immediate action recommended for safety. Contact for repairs or refunds.
